attributes.description: Sets the radio button to a readonly state.
attributes.name: readonly

attributes.description:
The radio button's size. When used inside a radio group, the size will be determined by the radio group's size so
this attribute can typically be omitted.
attributes.name: size

attributes.description: The radio's value. When selected, the radio group will receive this value.
attributes.name: value

cssParts.description: The internal button element when the radio button is checked.
cssParts.name: button--checked

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the radio button's label.
cssParts.name: label

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix.
cssParts.name: prefix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the suffix.
cssParts.name: suffix

events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when the button gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

methods.description: Removes focus from the radio button.
methods.name: blur

methods.description: Sets focus on the radio button.
methods.name: focus

properties.description: Sets the radio button to a readonly state.
properties.name: readonly

properties.description:
The radio button's size. When used inside a radio group, the size will be determined by the radio group's size so
this attribute can typically be omitted.
properties.name: size

properties.description: The radio's value. When selected, the radio group will receive this value.
properties.name: value

slots.description: A presentational prefix icon or similar element.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: A presentational suffix icon or similar element.
slots.name: suffix

summary: Radios buttons allow the user to select a single option from a group using a button-like control.
